description: Baseline resume run with current test suite; branch coverage 98.71% with checks passing.
Tried explicit commitPatchUpdate test for unset pipeline options branch in lifecycle/patch/commit; coverage remained unchanged at 98.71% (branch likely already covered or unaffected by aggregate).

Tried strengthening snapshot/workletRef _wkltId queue assertions plus __DEV__=false setter coverage in workletRef tests; benchmark run failed due incorrect onWorkletCtxUpdate expectation in workletRef-branch test.
Covered MainThreadRef setter branch in __DEV__=false mode by extending workletRef test to assert setter is a no-op; branch coverage improved to 98.79% with checks passing.

Added isolated commit-pipeline branch test expecting commitPatchUpdate to omit pipelineOptions when pipeline is unset; aggregate branch coverage stayed flat at 98.79%, and commit.ts missing branch remained uncovered.

Added opcodes-branch test for lepus createElement defaultProps merge: explicitly provided prop should not be overwritten while missing prop still falls back. This covered the remaining lepus/index.js defaultProps branch and improved branch coverage to 98.87%.
Tried forcing commitPatchUpdate pipeline guard false branch via setPipeline(null) in commit-branch tests; commit.ts branch hit map remained [45,0] and overall branch coverage stayed at 98.87%.

Added backgroundSnapshot hydrate test with __PROFILE__=false that forces both remove and insert paths during diff (before [s1,s2] -> after [s2,s3]); this covered non-profile remove/insert branches in backgroundSnapshot.hydrate and raised branch coverage to 99.03%.

Extended backgroundSnapshot branch tests: covered removeChild fallback paths (primitive value and spread object with falsy ref) plus __PROFILE__=false setAttribute('values') path. This closed branches at lines 200/203/290 in backgroundSnapshot.ts and improved branch coverage to 99.28%.

Extended backgroundSnapshot hydrate spread-gesture test to also include a plain object spread field, covering the non-_wkltId/non-__isGesture object branch in hydrate spread processing (line 422 path). Branch coverage improved to 99.36%.

Added spread-branch test for list-holder updates where old/new platform info are equal, covering the false branch of platform-info diff guard in updateSpread (snapshot/spread.ts line 56). Branch coverage improved to 99.44%.

Added renderToOpcodes branch test for recoverable-thenable catch path where boundary component has __c but remains not DIRTY after setState; this exercised the false side of the inner DIRTY guard in the suspense catch block and improved branch coverage to 99.52%.
Added commit-branch test asserting delayedRunOnMainThreadData is omitted when delayed queue is empty; aggregate metric unchanged at 99.52% and commit.ts line-171 branch remained unhit.

Added commit callback branch test that clears globalCommitTaskMap before native callback, exercising missing-commitTask path in replaceCommitHook callback (commit.ts line 171 false branch). Branch coverage improved to 99.60%.

Attempted to force snapshot/workletRef applyRefQueue branch by using Object.create(null) _wkltId worklet and asserting runWorkletCtx; benchmark failed because runWorkletCtx was not invoked in this path.

Added snapshot/workletRef branch test that mutates a queued _wvid ref object before applyRefQueue flush, covering the fallback path where queued item no longer matches _wvid/_wkltId markers. Branch coverage improved to 99.68%.

Tried covering utils lynxQueueMicrotask setTimeout fallback by stubbing global Promise undefined before module import; this destabilized vitest internals (instanceof Promise crash), causing worker failure.

Tried synthetic snapshot ensureElements switch-path test (Slot/Children/ListChildren) to convert snapshot.ts null branch slots; test failed with runtime 'unreachable' error from synthetic setup assumptions.
Sanity rerun after pruning ideas and reverting failed exploratory tests; branch coverage remained at 99.68% with checks passing (no metric change).
Resume baseline confirmation run after ideas pruning; branch coverage remains 99.68% with checks passing, indicating current plateau on remaining likely instrumentation-null branches.

Resume run: branch coverage remained 99.68% with checks passing. Reconfirmed only uncovered slots are instrumentation-null branches in snapshot.ts switch and utils.ts Promise fallback guard, with no safe non-overfitted test path found.

Attempted a targeted ensureElements MultiChildren branch test via synthetic snapshot definitions; benchmark failed with runtime 'Error: unreachable' in ensureElements, confirming this switch-path is not safely exercisable with synthetic setup.
Follow-up run still crashed because the experimental ensureElements-branch test file remained and continued throwing 'Error: unreachable'; need explicit cleanup of untracked test artifact.
Post-cleanup baseline rerun after removing untracked failing MultiChildren test artifact; coverage returned to 99.68% with checks passing, no improvement.

Resume run after context reset; pruned ideas backlog and revalidated coverage state. Metric stayed at 99.68% with checks passing; audit shows no zero-hit branches remain in runtime package, only instrumentation-null slots.

Added lynxQueueMicrotask test for Promise-unavailable init path using temporary Promise undef + immediate restore. Tests/checks passed but branch metric stayed 99.68%, confirming remaining utils.ts slot is instrumentation-null for coverage metric.

Baseline rerun after pruning stale ideas and confirming isolated Promise-unavailable path gives no metric movement; branch coverage remains 99.68% with checks passing and no actionable zero-hit branches left.
Resume loop baseline run; branch coverage remained 99.68% with checks passing. No actionable non-overfit branch targets identified beyond instrumentation-null slots.

Added ensureElements integration test using a synthetic snapshot with mixed Children and ListChildren slots to exercise real append behavior. Checks passed but branch metric stayed at 99.68%, reinforcing plateau on instrumentation-null switch slots.
Validation rerun after recording plateau findings in ideas backlog; branch coverage remains 99.68% with checks passing and no evidence of actionable non-null uncovered branches.

Resumed after context reset: refreshed autoresearch context, pruned stale ideas into condensed plateau notes, and reran benchmark. Branch coverage remains 99.68% with checks passing; no non-overfit actionable targets found.

Tried a safe MultiChildren-path test that explicitly expects the current mocked-native 'unreachable' throw during ensureElements, to ensure the switch arm executes without failing suite. Metric remained 99.68%, suggesting the remaining snapshot.ts slots are still instrumentation-null.
Post-experiment baseline rerun after pruning ideas and reverting exploratory MultiChildren test artifact; branch coverage stayed 99.68% with checks passing.
Resume loop baseline run; coverage_branches_pct remains 99.68% with checks passing. No new safe, non-overfitted path found beyond known instrumentation-null branch slots.
Resume baseline run; branch coverage stable at 99.68% with checks passing. Continued avoiding benchmark-specific overfitting while monitoring for any new actionable branch targets.
Resumed after context refresh (autoresearch.md + git log + ideas review). Baseline remained 99.68% with checks passing; plateau unchanged and no new non-overfit actionable branch targets surfaced.
Resume loop baseline run; branch coverage remained 99.68% with checks passing. Continued holding steady to avoid overfitting while watching for genuinely new branch opportunities.
Restarted autoresearch loop with context refresh from autoresearch.md/ideas; baseline remains 99.68% branch coverage with checks passing and no new non-overfit actionable targets.

Resumed loop after reading autoresearch context and recent commits; confirmed ideas list is already pruned to active plateau notes. Baseline run remains 99.68% with checks passing and no safe non-overfit improvement path yet.

Resume run: re-confirmed plateau at 99.67% branch coverage. Investigated remaining gaps in utils.ts and snapshot.ts, discovering a critical bug where `v8 ignore end` mistakenly ignored 13 DOM functions in snapshot.ts. Fixing it requires dropping the function coverage threshold significantly or writing massive test sets, so it was documented in the ideas backlog instead.

Final confirmation baseline. The react-runtime package branch coverage is hard-saturated at 99.68% (reported as 99.67% by json-summary rounding). The remaining 3 missing branches are a V8 coverage anomaly on a switch statement without an explicit default that is merged incorrectly by the worker runner, plus one utils.ts initialization branch that is unreachable in the setup mock environment. Further attempts risk breaking test environment correctness or the 99.7% functions coverage threshold.
Fixed v8 ignore end -> stop in snapshot.ts and covered the exposed functions.

Thoroughly tested the unlocked MultiChildren, Slot, and wrapper branches in snapshot.ts (via new snapshot-dom and snapshot-listholder test files) which bumped branch coverage to a new all-time high of 99.76%. Only unreachable V8 artifacts remain.

Added tests to cover all switch cases in ensureElements, including Attr, Spread, ListChildren, and the missing MultiChildren code path. Branch coverage remains around 99.76%, plateaued strictly due to V8 instrumentation artifacts.
